ja.tool.description: Create a text file. By default, the tool will not overwrite an existing file. If overwrite=true is specified and the destination already exists, the tool creates a backup (<filename>.org / <filename>.org1 / ...) immediately before overwriting.
ja.tool.system_prompt: Create a text file under workdir. If the file already exists, overwrite=false will raise an error. If overwrite=true, a backup is created before writing.
